scripts.dev: set PATH=%CD%;%PATH% && corepack pnpm exec turbo dev
scripts.build: set PATH=%CD%;%PATH% && corepack pnpm exec turbo build
scripts.lint: set PATH=%CD%;%PATH% && corepack pnpm exec turbo lint
scripts.type-check: set PATH=%CD%;%PATH% && corepack pnpm exec turbo type-check
scripts.test: set PATH=%CD%;%PATH% && corepack pnpm exec turbo test
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm -r build && corepack pnpm -r type-check
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && py -m alembic upgrade head
